reviews.author: shivangi lal
reviews.review_body:
Kothari Starz Pre school and Day care
Hats off to the awesome summer camp u have organized and the amazing activities to engrossed kids in a fun and learning way.
Hats off to Kamal Sharma ma'am, Baishakhi Sinha ma'am, Shveta D Sood ma'am, Bhawna ma'am, Shruti ma'am and Lovenita ma'am.  Blessed with the best teachers.

reviews.school_name: Kothari Starz Play School and Day Care - Sector 50
reviews.author: Capriati Saxena
reviews.review_body: Very happy with kids summer camp activities. Ekaaksh showed all his work with so much excitement. Appreciate the effort of  Neha ma'am.

reviews.school_name: Kothari Starz Play School and Day Care - Sector 50
reviews.author: Zainab Khan
reviews.review_body: KOTHARI STARZ, I must say the best School ever..we have had a great experience with the School. The School works on overall development of the child. The entire staff is very supportive and caring..Kamal Ma'am manages the School really well she even listen to every minute things from the parents , she is very supportive in all the matters realted to child..can't thank Neha Ma'am and Nidhi Ma'am enough for taking good care of my son. Both the teachers are very hard working, caring friendly and supportive in every manner my son is very fond of his Teachers

reviews.school_name: Kothari Starz Play School and Day Care - Sector 50
reviews.author: Ankur Shrivastava
reviews.review_body:
It is really a challenge when it comes to searching for a school for your child. Of course, as a parent, you will opt for the best one. The same happened with us this year when we relocated to Noida. My daughter has recently been enrolled to pre k and the whole admission process has been very smooth and professional.
The campus is huge and well maintained, the orientation was very well organized.
WELL EDUCATED TEACHERS, SUPPORTIVE COORDINATOR, WONDERFUL PRINCIPAL...
Kothari International School Noida, provides ample opportunities for personal growth and leadership development. My child has benefited from participating in student events and various excursions trips in the city, which has boosted her confidence and decision-making abilities. I am
really thankful to her class teachers Bhavya ma’am and Shruti ma’am for their efforts the put in each child individually which is commendable.

My child is constantly engaged and motivated to explore new things and ideas, thanks to the innovative teaching methods employed by the primary teachers.
I am grateful for the open communication between the school and parents. The teachers are always approachable and willing to discuss my child's progress, which has helped me stay involved and informed about her overall development, which is most essential in case of smaller kids.
This school is amazing! We are so glad to have gotten our child into here and look forward to many years of wonderful development.

reviews.school_name: Kothari Starz Play School and Day Care - Sector 50
reviews.author: Divya Sharma
reviews.review_body:
The dedication and commitment shown by the teachers towards their students have truly made a positive impact on the learning environment.
The teachers at this school go above and beyond to ensure the well-being and academic growth of their students.

Their caring attitude and nurturing approach create a conducive atmosphere for learning and personal development.

The special thanks to the teachers and didi. This is one of the best school in Noida.

reviews.school_name: Kothari Starz Play School and Day Care - Sector 50
reviews.author: Kajal lamba
reviews.review_body: The best pre school in NOIDA... My daughter is studying in kothari starz for the past two years... All the teachers , Didi's are the best and they nurture the kid so well , holistic development is done here ... If u are looking for a pre school you must visit the school..

reviews.school_name: Kothari Starz Play School and Day Care - Sector 50
reviews.author: jhankar pathak
reviews.review_body:
Kothari Starz was the best decision which we could have taken for our little child. The attention and inclusiveness that is given to each child by the Head, teachers and didis is just amazing.

They encourage the kids to participate in each and every activity, studies and performances giving them and parents to experience and explore their interests and strengths. Studies, activities, stage occurrence, out of school excursions, they tick each checkbox on the list of possibilities for a pre-schooler.

This is one school where preschoolers are not just brought on stage for a group dance but included in a proper well written skit giving them the roles based on their strengths.

My child who we used to categorise as shy and introverted actually gave a proper welcome speech for the Grandparents day yesterday.

We thank all the staff for their dedication and efforts to our kids.

reviews.school_name: Kothari Starz Play School and Day Care - Sector 50
reviews.author: Narendra Bam
reviews.review_body:
The infrastructure is reasonably good to address the current need of the students and to facilitate the educational atmosphere in the  campus.
Mostly the teaching staff is student friendly and professionaly competent.
Maintenence part taken care  by the supervisory staff is highly appreciable.
There has been a noticeable overall growth of our child. It indicates the positive approach towards required combo of academic and extracurricular activities offered to the students.
We wish more remarkable development of this valuable service of this academic
Institution to serve the most important demand of fast progressing society.

reviews.school_name: Kothari Starz Play School and Day Care - Sector 50
reviews.author: katyayni singh
reviews.review_body:
My daughter has been going to Kothari for 3 months and this has been a good decision so far.

Teachers are very nice with kid and that’s been most distinguishable feature

School also organises many outside trips and class activities that has helped with social development and communication skills for my daughter

reviews.school_name: Kothari Starz Play School and Day Care - Sector 50
reviews.author: Meenakshi
reviews.review_body: Thank you to Kothari Starz team for all the efforts you have put in for the grand parents day celebration.Hats off to lovenita ma’am and Khushboo ma’am.
